name: stech/accordion
title: Accordion / FAQ
description: Expandable question-and-answer list with animated panels.

accordion_items.accordion_items_question: Do I need a high school diploma to apply?
accordion_items.accordion_items_answer: Most programs require a diploma or GED, but some offer concurrent enrollment for high school students.
Tuition is $95 per credit hour. High school students attend free.
